hover.markdown:
```python
class Event(
    *,
    model_version: str | None = None,
    content: Content | None = None,
    grounding_metadata: GroundingMetadata | None = None,
    partial: bool | None = None,
    turn_complete: bool | None = None,
    finish_reason: FinishReason | None = None,
    error_code: str | None = None,
    error_message: str | None = None,
    interrupted: bool | None = None,
    custom_metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    usage_metadata: GenerateContentResponseUsageMetadata | None = None,
    live_session_resumption_update: LiveServerSessionResumptionUpdate | None = None,
    input_transcription: Transcription | None = None,
    output_transcription: Transcription | None = None,
    avg_logprobs: float | None = None,
    logprobs_result: LogprobsResult | None = None,
    cache_metadata: CacheMetadata | None = None,
    citation_metadata: CitationMetadata | None = None,
    interaction_id: str | None = None,
    invocation_id: str = '',
    author: str,
    actions: EventActions = EventActions,
    long_running_tool_ids: set[str] | None = None,
    branch: str | None = None,
    id: str = '',
    timestamp: float = lambda : platform_time.get_time()
)
```
---
Represents an event in a conversation between agents and users.

It is used to store the content of the conversation, as well as the actions
taken by the agents like function calls, etc.

```python
class EventActions(
    *,
    skip_summarization: bool | None = None,
    state_delta: dict[str, object] = dict,
    artifact_delta: dict[str, int] = dict,
    transfer_to_agent: str | None = None,
    escalate: bool | None = None,
    requested_auth_configs: dict[str, AuthConfig] = dict,
    requested_tool_confirmations: dict[str, ToolConfirmation] = dict,
    compaction: EventCompaction | None = None,
    end_of_agent: bool | None = None,
    agent_state: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    rewind_before_invocation_id: str | None = None,
    render_ui_widgets: list[UiWidget] | None = None
)
```
---
Represents the actions attached to an event.
